articles.author: Chan Ho-him
articles.title: Asian shares slip and oil prices retreat from latest flare in Iran tensions - AP News
articles.description: Asian stocks are trading lower, tracking losses on Wall Street after U.S. stocks fell from record highs. Oil prices fell back on Tuesday after jumping the day before as tensions between the U.S. and Iran escalated. U.S. futures edged higher. Markets in Japan,…
articles.content:
HONG KONG (AP) Asian stocks declined Tuesday, tracking losses on Wall Street after U.S. stocks retreated from record highs.
